17.gl: to lie down (for rest, sexual connection, decease or any other purpose)
17.kj: [idiom] at all, cast down, (lover-)lay (self) (down), (make to) lie (down, down to sleep, still with), lodge, ravish, take rest, sleep, stay.

17.gl: a vehicle; by implication, a team; by extension, cavalry; by analogy a rider, i.e. the upper millstone
17.kj: chariot, (upper) millstone, multitude (from the margin), wagon.

17.gl: a horse (as leaping); also a swallow (from its rapid flight)
17.dv: or סֻס; from an unused root meaning to skip (properly, for joy);

18.gl: properly, to mark (so as to be recognized), i.e. to remember; by implication, to mention;  to be male

18.gl: first, in place, time or rank (as adjective or noun)
18.kj: ancestor, (that were) before(-time), beginning, eldest, first, fore(-father) (-most), former (thing), of old time, past.

18.gl: not (the qualified negation, used as a deprecative); once (Job 24:25) as a noun, nothing
18.kj: nay, neither, [phrase] never, no, nor, not, nothing (worth), rather than.
ancient, they that went before, east, (thing of) old.

19.gl: meaning accession (used as an adverb or conjunction); also or yea; adversatively though
19.kj: also, [phrase] although, and (furthermore, yet), but, even, [phrase] how much less (more, rather than), moreover, with, yea.

19.gl: to sprout (transitive or intransitive, literal or figurative)
19.kj: bear, bring forth, (cause to, make to) bud (forth), (cause to, make to) grow (again, up), (cause to) spring (forth, up).

20.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock

24.kj: punishment (of sin), purifying(-fication for sin), sin(-ner, offering).

24.gl: fat, whether literally or figuratively; hence, the richest or choice part

25.kj: punishment (of sin), purifying(-fication for sin), sin(-ner, offering).

27.gl: first, in place, time or rank (as adjective or noun)
27.kj: ancestor, (that were) before(-time), beginning, eldest, first, fore(-father) (-most), former (thing), of old time, past.

27.gl: father, in a literal and immediate, or figurative and remote application
27.kj: chief, (fore-) father(-less), [idiom] patrimony, principal. Compare names in 'Abi-'.

28.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
28.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

28.gl: physical (as shutting in) a net (either literally or figuratively); usually a doomed object; abstractly extermination
28.kj: (ac-) curse(-d, -d thing), dedicated thing, things which should have been utterly destroyed, (appointed to) utter destruction, devoted (thing), net.

28.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
28.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

28.gl: a head person (of any rank or class)
